Home
Course Introduction

Welcome to

ONE Business Credo & Code of Conduct

E-learning Course

ONE Business Credo and Code of Conduct are fundamental policies of Ocean Network Express ("ONE").

In this course, you will discover the core beliefs and principles that shape ONE’s culture and guide our daily actions. By the end of this training, you will be equipped to confidently apply the ONE Business Credo and Code of Conduct in your work — supporting a safe, respectful, and responsible environment for everyone.

Table of Contents:

1

Chapter 1: ONE Business Credo

2

Chapter 2: ONE Code of Conduct

3

Chapter 3: SpeakUp! ONE Hotline System

4

Assessment

Each chapter includes:

Learning objectives

Course content

Knowledge check

Instructions:

Allow 15 minutes to complete each section in the chapters (estimated 100–120 minutes in total).

To go to the next section, you will need to work through each section from beginning to end, and correctly answer the Knowledge check.

Pass the Assessment on LMS, after you complete all sections.

Please view all content and complete the activities to unlock the next section.

Lesson 1 - Course Introduction
ONE Business Credo

Chapter 1

ONE Business Credo

ONE recognises its role in providing safe and reliable services for global trade. We deliver not just cargo, but trust, safety, and partnership.

These objectives will help you align with ONE’s mission and values in your daily work.

Learning Objectives:

By the end of this lesson, you will be able to:

1

Understand ONE’s core beliefs

2

Apply the Business Credo principles

3

Recognise the importance of trust, safety, and partnership

Contents:

In this chapter you will explore:

1

What is ONE's Business Credo and its importance?

2

How we apply our Business Credo

In the next section, you will explore the fundamental principles of ONE’s Business Credo and how these core beliefs shape our culture and guide your decisions throughout this course.

CONTINUE

on and how they guide our daily work:

1. Act as ONE

Act as ONE

We act in accordance with our ONE Business Credo and Code of Conduct at all times.

2. Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

We pursue safety, promote environmental protection, and aim for sustainable growth that co-exists with nature.

3. Observe Ethical Conduct and Compliance With Laws and Regulations
4. Nurture an Inclusive Workplace and Respect for Human Rights
5. Enhance Information Security and Protection of Assets

KNOWLEDGE CHECK

Now it’s time to reinforce your learning. In this section, you’ll answer questions to check your understanding of ONE’s core beliefs and business credo. Use what you’ve learned to demonstrate your knowledge and reflect on how these principles apply to your work.

Q.1

Which of the following are the five core principles of the ONE Business Credo? Select all that apply.

Act as ONE

Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

Observe Ethical Conduct and Compliance with Laws and Regulations

Nurture an Inclusive Workplace and Respect for Human Rights

Enhance Information Security and Protection of Assets

Customer Satisfaction Above All

Maximise Profits

SUBMIT


Incorrect

Review the five core principles:

1. Act as ONE

2. Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

5. Enhance Information Security and Protection of Assets

business_credo.q1_correct_excerpt:
Q.1

Which of the following are the five core principles of the ONE Business Credo? Select all that apply.

Act as ONE

Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

Observe Ethical Conduct and Compliance with Laws and Regulations

Nurture an Inclusive Workplace and Respect for Human Rights

Enhance Information Security and Protection of Assets

Customer Satisfaction Above All

Maximise Profits



Correct

The five core principles are:

1. Act as ONE

2. Safeguard Our Environment, Safety, and Quality

3. Observe Ethical Conduct and Compliance with Laws and Regulations

4. Nurture an Inclusive Workplace and Respect for Human Rights

5. Enhance Information Security and Protection of Assets
business_credo.q2_wrong_excerpt:
Q.2

As an ONE employee, I only need to follow the laws of the country where I am working. Is this understanding correct?

Yes

Incorrectly selected

No

Incorrectly unselected


Incorrect

As ONE operates globally, various foreign laws apply to our business. As an ONE employee, you must comply with all applicable international laws and regulations.

TAKE AGAIN

By achieving "As ONE, We Can" together, we fulfil ONE's commitment to being a trusted organisation that earns the respect of our customers, stakeholders, and society.

Q.2

As an ONE employee, I only need to follow the laws of the country where I am working. Is this understanding correct?

Yes

Correctly unselected

No

Correctly selected


Correct

As ONE operates globally, various foreign laws apply to our business. As an ONE employee, you must comply with all applicable international laws and regulations.

By achieving "As ONE, We Can" together, we fulfil ONE's commitment to being a trusted organisation that earns the respect of our customers, stakeholders, and society.

Lesson 2 - ONE Business Credo
Code of Conduct Introduction

Chapter 2

Code of Conduct

The Expectations

ONE Code of Conduct defines the standards and expectations for all ONE employees in their daily business activities.

Learning Objectives:

By the end of this lesson, you will be able to:

1

Explain the purpose, scope, and applicability of the ONE Code of Conduct

2

Apply the principles of our Business Credo to behaviour and conduct in workplace

3

Identify and comply with legal, ethical, environmental, safety, quality, and human rights requirements

4

Evaluate and determine appropriate actions in accordance with the enforcement requirements of the Code

All employees are expected to understand and act in accordance with the ONE Code of Conduct.

Go to Section 1 of the Code

1. Act as ONE

Chapter 2

Code of Conduct

1. Act As ONE

Responsibility & General Standards

The Code of Conduct is a collective commitment. While leadership sets the tone, every employee at ONE is responsible for maintaining our unified and safe culture. This section explores the specific roles leadership and employees play in safeguarding our values.

Click on each role to see responsibility and general standards of behaviour at ONE:

Top Management
ONE Employees

Bad Example
